creator: matthew@wener.org
text:
Created attachment 241102
Patch to 4.8.0.26

LibSkiaSharp and libvips removed, so removed run_depends associated with them.

The release notes reference that ffmpeg has been updated to version 5.1, but the version being built is still 5.0. Is there a new custom ffmpeg available for freebsd?

https://github.com/MediaBrowser/Emby.Releases/releases/tag/4.8.0.26
